p4.desc: Browser-based Pokémon card creator with real-time preview. Fully customizable (type, attacks, energy costs, rarity, stats) with PNG export at 4x resolution, JSON save/load, and bilingual UI (EN/FR).

p3.desc: CNN built from scratch (no ML framework) to classify chest X-rays into 3 classes: Normal, Bacterial Pneumonia, Viral Pneumonia. Full pipeline: convolution, ReLU, pooling, GAP, CAM and FC layers, with data augmentation across 15,000 images.

p2.desc: Open-source browser extension for VoirAnime adding dark/light theming, modular CSS architecture, auto player selection, and a fully configurable popup. Available on Chrome Web Store and Firefox Add-ons.

p1.desc: Connected garden management system with automated watering control based on real-time sensor data (temperature, air & soil humidity, luminosity). Dashboard with live charts, historical logs, alert thresholds, scheduling, and CSV data export. IoT pipeline via MQTT/TTN with LoRaWAN sensors.
